title: Time In A Bottle Charger
description: Adds a single block that uses energy to add time to your time in a bottle
body:
Time In A Bottle Charger adds a simple block that when powered will fill your time in a bottle with energy

The amount of energy needed per second can be configured to be any number you can also configure the amount of time it give as well  

["TIAB Charger"]
    #The amount of RF needed to add a defined charge of time, default = 20000
    "RF per charge" = 10000
    #The amount of seconds added per charge, default = 10
    "Seconds per charge" = 10
